MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_SHOW_INPUT_DIRECTION_BUTTONS: Kui siin linnukest ei ole, näidatakse neid nuppusid uue kirja dialoogis ainult paremalt vasakule kirjutatavates keeltes.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_REGISTER_MAILTO:
Veebis e-posti lingile (mailto) klõpsamisel avaneb käesolevas veebipostirakenduses uue kirja dialoog.
Ülalolev link ei pruugi töötada, kui olete mailto-linke avava rakenduse juba varem määranud.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_SPECIAL_FOLDERS: Kasuta ettemääratud kaustade jaoks järgmisi IMAP-postkaste:
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_IMAGE_DRAGNDROP: Võite siia ka teisest aknast pildi lohistada.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_SPECIFY_CREDENTIALS: E-postirakenduse kasutamiseks sisestage oma kasutajatunnus ja parool.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_NO_ACCOUNTS: Ühtegi kontot ei ole. Uue konto loomiseks klõpsake „Lisan uue konto”.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_NO_SERVERS: Ühtegi serverit ei ole lisatud. Lisamiseks klõpsake  „Lisan uue serveri”.
MAILWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_REMOVE_SERVER: Kas kustutada see server? Note that all its users will be deleted too.
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_DISPLAY_NAME: Siia võib kirjutada omale meelepärase nime. Seda nime näevad ka kasutajad, kui neile on antud võimalus lisada ise uus konto.
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_DOMAINS_CANNOT_EDIT_HTML:
Domeeni sidumiseks selle postiserveriga klõpsake „Domeenid” ja lisage domeen.
Kui kasutate vaid üht postiserverit, ei ole domeene tingimata vaja lisada. Siiski on e-postikontode haldamine nende abil lihtsam, kui teil on mitmeid domeene.
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_DOMAINS: Jätke see tühjaks, kui kõik e-postikontod peavad kasutama seda postiserverit. Muidu aga, kui teil on mitu serverit või soovite piirata juurdepääsu teatavatele e-posti domeenidele, loetlege lubatud domeenid siin (üks domeen rea kohta). Kui ei ole teada, millist postiserverit on vaja kasutada esimesel sisselogimisel e-postikontole, valib veebimeiler sellest loetelust ise sobiva postiserveri või annab teate sisselogimisel tekkinud vea kohta, kui domeeni üheski loetelus ei ole. Tärn (*) tähistab iga domeeni, välja arvatud need, mis on juba loetletud.
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_DOMAINS_WILDCARD: Tärn või tühi loetelu võivad kõikide postiserverite kõikides domeenide loeteludes esineda vaid ühe korra.
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_USE_USER_CREDENTIALS: Kasutajatunnus ja parool on samad mis saabuval postil
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_ENABLE_SIEVE: Kasutusel on Sieve, kui server seda võimaldab.
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_USE_TO_AUTHORIZE: Kui siin on linnuke, saab kasutajakontole sisse logida e-posti kasutajatunnuse ja parooliga.
MAILWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_DELETE_MESSAGES_PLURAL: Kas kustutada valitud kiri jäädavalt?|Kas kustutada valitud kirjad jäädavalt?
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_USE_FULL_EMAIL_ADDRESS_AS_LOG: Siin peab olema linnuke, kui kasutajatunusena tuleb sisestada kogu e-postiaadress ("kasutajatunnus{'@'}domeen"), mitte  lihtsalt aadressi esimene osa ("kasutajatunnus").
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_ADMIN_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_SERVERS: IMAP- ja SMTP-serverid teistes e-postiklientides kasutamiseks
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_ADMIN_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_SERVERS:
Kui need on määratud, näevad kasutajad neid parameetreid oma e-posti ja mobiilse sünkroniseerimise seadetes.
See on kasulik, kui veebipostiklient kasutab IMAP-serverit aadressil "localhost", aga teistes e-postiklientides tuleb kasutada serveri aadressi "mail.teiefirma.ee".
Veebimeiler neid parameetreid ise ei kasuta, vaid ainult kuvab need teie kasutajatele.
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_SERVERS: IMAP- ja SMTP-serverid teistes e-posti programmides kasutamiseks
MAILWEBCLIENT.LABEL_HINT_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_SERVERS: Neid parameetreid võite kasutada oma e-postikontole pääsemiseks muudes e-posti programmides või äppides.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_ADMIN_OAUTH: Saate võimaldada selle postiserveri jaoks oAuth-autentimise, valides ühe järgmistest parameetritest:
MAILWEBCLIENT.HINT_TENANT_SPACE_LIMIT: Üürniku ruumipiirangut rakendatakse kõikidele üürniku kasutajatele. Kui panna siia 0, ei ole üürnikul ruumipiirangut.
MAILWEBCLIENT.HINT_USER_SPACE_LIMIT: Kasutaja ruumipiirang rakendatakse loodud uue kasutaja suhtes vaikimisi.
MAILWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_DELETE_ALIAS: Kas kustutada see alias? See kustutatakse ka e-postiserverist.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_AUTO_ENCRYPT_SIGN_MESSAGE: Kiri krüpteeritakse automaatselt ja/või signeeritakse kontaktide jaoks OpenPGP võtmetega.
MAILWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_ENCRYPT_NOT_ALL_RECIPIENTS: NB! Kõik adresaadid ei pruugi saada krüpteeritud kirju vastu võtta. Nendele saadetakse kirja krüpteerimata koopia. Soovi korral saate liikuda tagasi ja redigeerida adressaatide nimekirja.
MAILWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_SIGN_NOT_ALL_RECIPIENTS: NB! Kõik adressaadid ei pruugi saada signeeritud kirju vastu võtta. Nendele saadetakse kirja signeerimata koopia. Soovi korral saate liikuda tagasi ja redigeerida adressaatide nimekirja.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_ATTACHMENTS_NOT_SIGNED_ENCRYPTED: NB! Manuseid ei krüpteerita ega signeerita.
MAILWEBCLIENT.INFO_MESSAGE_WILL_BE_CONVERTED_TO_PLAIN: OpenPGP toetab ainult lihttekstis vormindust. Enne krüpteerimist kõrvaldatakse tekstist vormindus.
MAILWEBCLIENT.ERROR_CREDENTIALS_INCORRECT: Aadressi {EMAIL} ei õnnestunud autentida. Vale kasutajatunnus või parool.
MAILWEBCLIENT.REPORT_UNSUBSCRIBE_MESSAGE_SUCCESS: You have successfully unsubscribed from these messages.
MAILWEBCLIENT.ERROR_UNSUBSCRIBE_MESSAGE_FAIL: An error occurred while unsubscribing from the message.
MAILWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_UNSUBSCRIBE_WITH_EMAIL: A message will be sent to {RECIPIENT} in order to unsubscribe from these messages.
MAILWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_UNSUBSCRIBE_WITH_EMAIL_AND_SUBJE: A message with subject {SUBJECT} will be sent to {RECIPIENT} in order to unsubscribe from these messages.

OAUTHINTEGRATORWEBCLIENT.INFO_ES_SETTINGS: Selle teabe leiate vastava välisteenuse juhtpaneelist.
OAUTHINTEGRATORWEBCLIENT.INFO_SET_PASSWORD: Selleks et teistel rakendustel või seadmetel oleks teie kontole juurdepääs, peate määrama selleks parooli.
OAUTHINTEGRATORWEBCLIENT.ERROR_SERVICE_NOT_ALLOWED: Sisselogimine selle teenuse kaudu ei ole lubatud.
OAUTHINTEGRATORWEBCLIENT.ERROR_ACCOUNT_NOT_ALLOWED: Sellel kontol ei ole lubatud sisse logida.
OAUTHINTEGRATORWEBCLIENT.ERROR_ACCOUNT_IMAP_VALIDATION_FAILED: Miski läks valesti. Teie Gmaili kontot ei õnnestunud lisada. Palun kontrollige, et see oleks õige Gmaili konto.

OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_TO_ENCRYPT_SPECIFY_RECIPIENTS: To encrypt your message you need to specify at least one recipient.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.REPORT_MESSAGE_SIGNED_ENCRYPTED_SUCCSESS: Message has been signed and encrypted successfully.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_NO_KEYS_TO_IMPORT: The text contains no keys that can be imported.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_EXTERNAL_KEYS_FOR_IMP: External keys (will be stored in Personal contacts)
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_OWN_KEYS_FOR_IMPORT: Your own keys (will be stored on device only)
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_KEYS_ALREADY_IN_SYSTE: Keys that are already in the system will not be imported
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_KEYS_EXTERNAL_PRIVATE: External private keys are not supported and will not be imported
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_PUBLIC_KEYS_WITH_EMAI: The following key will be added to the contact.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_NOT_PUBLIC_KEYS_OR_WI: Only public key with {EMAIL} email is allowed. The following keys will not be added to the contact.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_TEXT_CONTAINS_KEYS_WITH_NO_EMAIL: Keys with no email address in their names
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_IMPORT_NO_KEY_FOUND: No OpenPGP keys found for import.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.REPORT_KEY_SUCCESSFULLY_IMPORTED_PLURAL: OpenPGP key was successfully imported.|OpenPGP keys was successfully imported.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_IMPORT_KEY: An error occurred when importing OpenPGP key.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_IMPORT_NO_KEY_SELECTED: No OpenPGP keys selected for import.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_GENERATE_KEY: An error occurred when generating OpenPGP key.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_DECRYPT: An error occurred during decrypting the message.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_KEY_NOT_DECODED: You might have entered the wrong password for {USER} key.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_SIGN: An error occurred during signing the message.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_VERIFY: An error occurred during verifying the message.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_ENCRYPT: An error occurred during encrypting the message.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_ENCRYPT_OR_SIGN: An error occurred during encrypting or signing the message.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_DECRYPT_OR_VERIFY: An error occurred during decrypting or verifying the message.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_DELETE_KEY: An error occurred when deleting OpenPGP key.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_NO_PUBLIC_KEYS_FOR_USERS_PLURAL: No public key found for {USERS} user.|No public keys found for {USERS} users.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_NO_PUBLIC_KEY_FOUND_FOR_VERIFY: No public key found for message verification.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_NO_PRIVATE_KEYS_FOR_USERS_PLURAL: No private key found for {USERS} user.|No private keys found for {USERS} users.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_NO_PRIVATE_KEY_FOUND_FOR_DECRYPT: No private key found for message decryption.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_SAVE_ENCRYPTED_DRAFT: Save encrypted draft? You will still be able to send e-mail from it but not edit its text body.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_HTML_TO_PLAIN_FORMATTING: OpenPGP supports plain text only. Click OK to remove all the formatting and continue.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_HTML_TO_PLAIN_ATTACHMENTS: Also, attachments cannot be encrypted or signed and will stay as-is.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.REPORT_MESSAGE_SUCCESSFULLY_DECRYPTED_AN: Message was successfully decrypted and verified.
Message was successfully decrypted and it was not signed while creating.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_DELETE_KEY: Are you sure you want to delete OpenPGP key for {KEYEMAIL}?
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_KEYS_EXIST_PLURAL: You already have an OpenPGP key for email of your account.|You already have an OpenPGP keys for all emails of your accounts.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_ENCRYPTED_MESSAGE_NO_PRIVATE_KEY: The message is encrypted. But there is no appropriate PGP private key in OpenPGP section in Settings.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_ALLOW_AUTOSAVE: Check "Allow autosave in Drafts" setting in Mail module. Turn it off if you don't want the server to store unencrypted drafts. You will still be able to save drafts manually (Ctrl-S).
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_EMPTY_PUBLIC_KEYS: You don't have any public keys.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_EMPTY_PRIVATE_KEYS: You don't have any private keys.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_VERIFY_PASSWORD: Before the OpenPGP private key can be shown, we need to verify this key's password.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_MESSAGE_SUCCESSFULLY_DECRYPTED_BUT: Message was successfully decrypted but wasn't verified.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.REPORT_KEY_IN_CLIPBOARD: The key has been copied to the clipboard.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_SEND_KEY: Would you like to send your public OpenPGP key to {EMAIL}?
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.CONFIRM_SEND_PRIVATE_KEY: Sending the private key over email is insecure and should be avoided if possible. Click 'OK' only if you know what you're doing.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.LABEL_PUBLIC_KEYS_FROM_PERSONAL_CONTACTS: Public keys from the Personal address book
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_NO_PUBLIC_KEYS_FROM_PERSONAL_CONTAC: You don't have any public keys from the Personal address book
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.LABEL_YOUR_KEYS_HINT: PGP key related to the main account can be added to your contact in the team address book. This lets your teammates easily write an encrypted message to you without exchanging the keys manually.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ACTION_SAVE_KEY_TO_MY_TEAM_CONTACT: Add key to my team contact
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ACTION_UPDATE_KEY_IN_MY_TEAM_CONTACT: Update key in my team contact
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_OWN_KEY_IS_ALREADY_IN_TEAM_CONTACT: This key matches your team contact's key
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_EMAILS_DO_NOT_MATCH: Key and contact emails do not match
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.ERROR_ADDED_KEY_NOT_PUBLIC: The added key is not public.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.LABEL_REMEMBER_PASSPHRASE: Remember OpenPGP key password until you log out or close this tab in the browser.
OPENPGPWEBCLIENT.INFO_REMEMBER_PASSPHRASE: If not checked, the system will ask for your OpenPGP key password every time it's needed.

RECAPTCHAWEBCLIENTPLUGIN.ERROR_RECAPTCHA_VERIFICATION_DID_NOT_COM: Te ei läbinud reCAPTCHA kontrolli korrektselt.

STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.ERROR_INCORRECT_EMAIL: Please specify a correct email address.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.ERROR_LINK_NOT_VALID: The link you've used is no longer valid.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_YOU_HAVE_RECOVERY_EMAIL: You've specified {EMAIL} as recovery email. The address is confirmed.

To confirm it please follow the instructions in the message sent to {EMAIL}.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_NOT_SET_RECOVERY_EMAIL: No recovery email set for this account.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_YOUR_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD: To perform this operation you need to specify a password for your account.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.ERROR_SET_RECOVERY_EMAIL: An error occurred while changing the recovery email.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.ERROR_EMPTY_PASSWORD: Please specify your current account password.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.LABEL_RESET_PASSWORD_MESSAGE: You've requested password reset for your {SITE_NAME} account.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.LABEL_CONFIRM_EMAIL_SUBJECT: Someone added {RECOVERY_EMAIL} as their recovery email
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.LABEL_CONFIRM_EMAIL_MESSAGE: Someone added {RECOVERY_EMAIL} as their recovery email on {SITE_NAME}.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_EMAIL_RECOVER_SENT: The message with password recovery instructions for {USERNAME} account will be sent to {EMAIL}
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.ERROR_RECOVERY_EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: The recovery email for specified account was not found.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.ERROR_RECOVERY_EMAIL_NOT_SENT: An error occurred while sending recovery email.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_RECOVERY_LINK_SENT: An email message with recovery instructions for {USERNAME} account was just sent to {EMAIL}. Please check your mailbox.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_RESET_PASSWORD_HASH:
for {USERNAME}.

Please specify new password for your account.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_PASSWORD_CHANGED: Your password has been successfully changed. Now you can sign in using your new password.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.ERROR_PASSWORD_CHANGE: An error occurred while changing the password.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.INFO_CONFIRM_EMAIL_RECOVERY_HASH: You've confirmed your {RECOVERY_EMAIL} recovery email for your {SITE_NAME} account.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.HINT_RECOVERY_LINK_LIFETIME: The setting determines how many minutes after creating link that confirms recovery email and link that resets password will be valid.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.HINT_NOTIFICATION_TYPE_MAIL: Send messages using PHP's mail() function.
STANDARDRESETPASSWORD.HINT_NOTIFICATION_TYPE_ACCOUNT: Send messages using SMTP. SMTP settings are obtained from the account with email specified above.

TENANTADMINPANELWEBCLIENT.ERROR_CANNOT_LOGOUT_FROM_ADMINPANEL:
An error has occurred during attempt to log out of tenant adminpanel. You can try log out of it manually.
Log out of here and open adminpanel in new tab

TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_ABOUT_TWOFACTORAUTH: Increase your security by enabling two factor verification for your account.
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_ABOUT_CONFIRMATION: Accessing Two Factor Verification settings requires confirmation of your account password
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_ABOUT_TWOFACTORAUTH_USE: You can use a mobile application like Google Authenticator to scan the QR code below. Alternatively, you can enter your secret key there. Mobile app will then be able to generate one-time codes you'll need to additionaly enter during the login procedure.
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_ENTER_CODE: Now, to make sure that everything is configured correctly, get a new code value in the mobile app and enter it here.
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_ABOUT_TWOFACTORAUTH_ENABLED: For better security, two factor verification is enabled for your account.
TWOFACTORAUTH.CONFIRM_MODULE_NOT_ENABLED: Please note that it is strictly recommended to turn on two factor authentication.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_TFA_ENABLED_FOR_USER: Two factor authentication is enabled for {USER} user.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_TFA_DISABLED_FOR_USER: Two factor authentication is not enabled for {USER} user.
TWOFACTORAUTH.CONFIRM_DISABLE_TFA: Are you sure you want to turn off two factor authentication for {USER} user?
TWOFACTORAUTH.REPORT_DISABLE_USER_TFA: Two factor authentication was successfully turned off for {USER} user.
TWOFACTORAUTH.ERROR_DISABLE_USER_TFA: Error occurred while turning off two factor authentication for {USER} user.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_SETUP_BACKUP_CODES: These printable one-time passcodes allow you to sign in when away from your phone, like when you’re traveling.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_SHOW_BACKUP_CODES: {COUNT} single-use codes are active at this time, but you can generate more as needed.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_KEEP_CODES_SAFE: Keep these backup codes somewhere safe but accessible.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_USE_CODE_ONCE: You can only use each backup code once.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_GET_NEW_CODES: If you get a new set of backup codes, existing codes will be deactivated.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_ENTER_BACKUP_CODE: Enter one of your 8-character backup codes
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_TWA_OPTIONS: You can use Authenticator app (for example, Google Authenticator or Yubico Authenticator) or Security Key (for example, Yubico key).
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_AUTHENTICATOR_APP: Allows for getting verification codes, even when your phone is offline. Available for Android and iPhone.
TWOFACTORAUTH.CONFIRM_DISABLE_AUTHENTICATOR_APP: Are you sure you want to stop using Authenticator App for two factor verification?
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_SECURITY_KEYS: Verification method that allows for signing in using a security device (for example, YubiKey). The keys can connect to your phone directly, via Bluetooth, or plug into your computer’s USB port.
TWOFACTORAUTH.ERROR_ADD_SECURITY_KEY: Error occurred while adding security key.
TWOFACTORAUTH.ERROR_VERIFY_SECURITY_KEY: Error occurred while verifying security key.
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_CREATE_SECURITY_KEY: Please follow the instructions in the popup window
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_SECURITY_KEY_NAME: Specify display name of the security key
TWOFACTORAUTH.ERROR_SETUP_SECRET_KEY_NAME: Error occurred while setting up security key name.
TWOFACTORAUTH.CONFIRM_REMOVE_SECURITY_KEY: Are you sure you want to delete {KEYNAME} key?
TWOFACTORAUTH.ERROR_DELETE_SECURITY_KEY: Error occurred while deleting security key.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_TWA_VERIFICATION: This extra step is intended to confirm it’s really you trying to sign in
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_SECURITY_KEY_VERIFICATION: Please follow the instructions in the popup window
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_INSERT_TOUCH_SECURITY_KEY: Insert your security key into the USB port and touch it
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_SECURITY_KEY_ERROR_VERIFICATION: Try using your security key again or try another way to verify it's you
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_SECURITY_KEY_ERROR_VERIFICATION_NO_: Try using your security key again to verify it's you
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_SECURITY_KEY_ERROR_HTTPS_NEEDED: For Security key functionality to work, make sure you load this application via https, not http
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_SECURITY_KEY_ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED: Your current browser doesn't support adding Security Keys. Please try a different browser, for example Google Chrome
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_AUTHENTICATOR_APP_VERIFICATION: Specify verification code from Authenticator app
TWOFACTORAUTH.LABEL_TRUST_DEVICE_PLURAL: Don't ask again on this device for {COUNT} day|Don't ask again on this device for {COUNT} days
TWOFACTORAUTH.HINT_DEVICE_CUSTOM_NAME: Enter the custom name for this device
TWOFACTORAUTH.CONFIRM_LOGOUT_DEVICE: You'll need to sign in again on that device.
TWOFACTORAUTH.ERROR_LOGOUT_DEVICE: Error occurred while logging out from device.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_TRUST_DEVICES: Two factor verification will be skipped on devices you trust.
TWOFACTORAUTH.INFO_REVOKE_ALL: You can revoke trusted status from your devices that skip Two factor Verification.
TWOFACTORAUTH.CONFIRM_REVOKE_ALL: To sign in again, you'll need to provide a second factor.
TWOFACTORAUTH.ERROR_REVOKE_TRUST: Error occurred while revoking trust from devices.
